Hero — Vision Tab Opening
Full-screen first impression. Background video plays behind the title.
MP4 file in same folder — e.g. bifrost_bg.mp4
Mission Quote — Art Band with Overlay Text
Full-width artwork with the mission quote overlaid. Appears between What We Teach and The Four Pillars.
Shown below the quote in small caps

What Makes Us Different — Art Background Section
2-column grid of feature cards with artwork behind them. Background image is baked in.
Feature Cards
Each card has a bold title and body text. The last card spans full width automatically.
